business.name: Southwest Electric Solutions
business.tagline: Powering Arizona with Expert Electrical Solutions

hero.headline: Phoenix's Premier *Electrical Experts* — Same-Day Service Guaranteed
hero.subheadline: From emergency repairs to complete panel upgrades, our certified electricians deliver safe, reliable solutions with transparent flat-rate pricing throughout the Valley.

services_section.label: OUR EXPERTISE
services_section.heading: Complete Electrical Services for Arizona Homes & Businesses
services_section.subheading: From routine maintenance to complex installations, we handle every electrical need with precision and safety.

services.title: Emergency Electrical Repairs
services.description: 24/7 rapid response for power outages, sparking outlets, tripped breakers, and electrical hazards. Our certified technicians diagnose and fix problems fast to restore your safety.

services.title: Electrical Panel Upgrades
services.description: Replace outdated fuse boxes and panels with modern circuit breaker systems. Increase capacity, improve safety, and meet current electrical codes for today's power demands.

services.title: Complete Home Rewiring
services.description: Full-service rewiring for older homes, additions, and renovations. We install modern copper wiring, GFCI outlets, and code-compliant electrical systems that last decades.

services.title: Commercial Electrical Solutions
services.description: Lighting installations, machinery wiring, electrical maintenance, and code compliance for Arizona businesses. Minimize downtime with professional commercial electrical services.

services.title: Ceiling Fan & Light Installation
services.description: Professional installation of ceiling fans, chandeliers, recessed lighting, and outdoor fixtures. Proper wiring and secure mounting for optimal performance and safety.

services.title: Electrical Safety Inspections
services.description: Comprehensive electrical system evaluations to identify hazards, code violations, and potential problems before they become expensive emergencies or safety risks.

about.heading: Arizona's Trusted Electrical Contractors Since 2008
about.body: Southwest Electric Solutions has been keeping Phoenix Valley homes and businesses safely powered for over 15 years. Our master electricians combine decades of experience with the latest electrical technologies to deliver reliable, code-compliant solutions that protect your property and family.

reviews_section.label: CLIENT TESTIMONIALS
reviews_section.heading: What Our Customers Say About Our Electrical Work

reviews.name: Maria G.
reviews.text: Called Southwest Electric at 11 PM when our main breaker kept tripping. Tech arrived within 45 minutes, diagnosed a faulty panel connection, and had us back up safely by 1 AM. Fair pricing even for emergency service.

reviews.name: David L.
reviews.text: Needed our entire upstairs rewired for a kitchen renovation. They provided a detailed flat-rate quote upfront, finished exactly on schedule, and passed city inspection on the first try. True professionals.

reviews.name: Jennifer R.
reviews.text: Had them install recessed lighting throughout our living room and dining area. The electrician was meticulous about placement, cleaned up perfectly, and the lights look amazing. Great attention to detail.

reviews.name: Carlos M.
reviews.text: Southwest Electric upgraded our old fuse box to a modern 200-amp panel. They explained everything clearly, pulled proper permits, and the whole job took just one day. Highly recommend their panel services.

service_areas.label: SERVICE COVERAGE
service_areas.heading: Serving the Greater Phoenix Metropolitan Area
service_areas.subheading: Our certified electricians provide same-day service throughout the Valley of the Sun.

cta.heading: Ready to Solve Your Electrical Problems?
cta.body: Don't let electrical issues put your safety at risk. Our certified electricians are standing by 24/7 to provide fast, professional solutions with upfront flat-rate pricing.
